reasoning_chain_text: 1. For January 2019, 2020, and 2021, identify issuing agencies in the top 20 by total parking-violation fines each year and keep the agencies that qualify every year.

2. From those agencies, keep only the U.S. national law-enforcement bodies and compare their January moving-violation counts in 2019, 2020, and 2021 to identify the body with the highest three-year average.
3. Using that law-enforcement body's reference page, determine which federal agency operates it.
original_final_question: Across January 2019-2021, identify the issuing agencies that consistently ranked in the top 20 by total parking-violation fines. From those, keep only the U.S. national law-enforcement bodies and find which had the highest average number of January moving violations from 2019-2021. Which federal agency operates that law-enforcement body? Return the agency name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
